# Resetting Your Password

Source: https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000418642

## How to Reset a Forgotten Password

  1. Go to the Helium login page and click [**Forgot your Password?**](https://app.heliumedu.com/forgot)
  2. Enter your email address
  3. Check your inbox for the reset link
  4. Follow the instructions to create a new password

## Changing Your Password While Logged In

  1. Open [**Settings → Change Password**](https://app.heliumedu.com/settings)
  2. Enter your **Current password**
  3. Enter your **New password**
  4. Re-enter your new password in the **Confirm password** field
  5. Tap **Save**

> **Note:** The Change Password option is only shown if your account was created with an email and password. If you signed up through a third-party provider (such as Google), password management is handled by that provider.

## Troubleshooting

  * If you don't see the reset email, check your spam or junk folder
  * Try searching your inbox for "Helium" or "password reset"

## Related Articles

  * [Signing In with Google or Apple](https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000426995)

---

## Helium Classic

In Helium Classic, the password reset option works the same way, but in a different location. The logged-in password change option is no longer available in Helium Classic.

  * **Forgot your password:** Click [**Forgot your Password?**](https://www.heliumedu.com/forgot) on the login page

 _Helium Classic will remain available through at least Summer 2026._
